welcome.title: Welcome to MaLaLongXia
welcome.subtitle: OpenClaw One-Click Installer
welcome.description: OpenClaw one-click installer to help you set up an AI programming environment
welcome.feature4: AI coding out of the box

envCheck.title: Environment Check
envCheck.description: Checking your system environment, please wait...
envCheck.networkOffline: Unable to connect to the network
envCheck.networkWarning: Network check failed, but you can continue
envCheck.hasWarnings: Some checks have warnings, but you can continue
envCheck.hasFailed: Some checks failed, certain features may be affected

nodeInstall.title: Install Node.js
nodeInstall.description: Install or detect Node.js runtime environment
nodeInstall.nvmDesc: Manage multiple Node.js versions with nvm
nodeInstall.directDesc: Download and install directly, simple and fast
nodeInstall.verifyFailed: {{missing}} verification failed. Go back to retry or restart the app.

openclawInstall.title: Install OpenClaw
openclawInstall.description: Download and install OpenClaw AI assistant from mirror
openclawInstall.strategy: Auto-selects the fastest mirror. Switch to another if installation fails.
openclawInstall.npmNotAvailable: npm is not available, cannot install OpenClaw
openclawInstall.npmNotAvailableHint: Go back to install Node.js first, or install manually and restart the app.
openclawInstall.winConsoleWarning: Command prompt windows may pop up during installation. This is normal — please do not close them manually. They will disappear automatically when done.

apiConfig.title: AI API Configuration
apiConfig.description: Select an AI provider and configure your API key
apiConfig.modelHint: Format: provider/model. Leave empty for default.
apiConfig.testFail: Connection failed, check your key and URL
apiConfig.skipHint: You can configure the API later in settings
apiConfig.rooyunDesc: AI model aggregation, one key for all models

completion.title: Setup Complete
completion.openclawReady: All components are installed and configured. You're ready to go!
completion.contactDesc: Scan the WeChat QR code below to get help
completion.benefitSkillDesc: Efficient prompt templates for AI programming
completion.benefitSupportDesc: 1-on-1 help with installation and configuration issues
completion.benefitCommunityDesc: Share experiences and tips with other developers
completion.benefitBetaDesc: First to get feature updates and beta testing access
completion.scanDesc: Add on WeChat with note "OpenClaw" for tips and exclusive support
completion.scanHint: You'll get: Tips & docs + Priority support + Community invite

dashboard.title: OpenClaw Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: OpenClaw is installed and ready
dashboard.reinstallConfirm: Are you sure you want to reinstall? This will remove the current installation
dashboard.webUIHint: OpenClaw gateway is running. Click to access the WebUI dashboard
dashboard.uninstallConfirm: Select components to remove (cannot be undone):
dashboard.uninstallOptionNode: Node.js (portable version installed by this tool)
dashboard.uninstallOptionGit: Git (MinGit / portable version installed by this tool)

feishu.title: Feishu Plugin
feishu.description: Install and configure the OpenClaw Feishu integration
feishu.configSuccess: Feishu configuration saved. Restart gateway to apply.

errors.networkError: Network connection failed. Please check your network settings and try again
errors.installFailed: Installation failed. Please check the logs for details
errors.permissionDenied: Insufficient permissions. Please run as administrator
errors.nodeVersionTooLow: Node.js version is too low. Version {{minVersion}} or higher is required
errors.mirrorUnavailable: Mirror source is unavailable. Please select another mirror
errors.connectionTimeout: Connection timed out. Please try again later
